title: 11 Effective Herbal Remedies for Teenagers Suffering from Menstrual Cramps
description: Chamomilla recutita creams are a popular natural remedy for menstrual cramps. They contain properties like apigenin and luteolin, which have anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. These compounds help relax the uterine muscles, reducing cramping and spasms. Chamomilla recutita creams also contain soothing and calming properties like bisabolol, which can ease anxiety and stress associated with menstrual cramps.
